name: plan-forge
description: Plan Forge — Harden AI-driven development plans into drift-proof execution contracts. 7-step pipeline, 19 reviewer agents, 13 skills, 65 MCP tools (core + LiveGuard + Watcher + Crucible + Tempering + Bug Registry + Testbed), 45+ CLI commands, live dashboard, quorum mode, self-recursive intelligence (Forge + LiveGuard), OpenBrain memory integration, cost tracking. Supports 9 presets (dotnet, typescript, python, java, go, swift, rust, php, azure-iac).
author: srnichols
